ModMetadata.Name: Entropy.Processor
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Entropy.Processor[/h1]
Integrated Circuit processor replacement for Stationeers. Has better performance and supports easy extensibility.
[b]WARNING:[/b] This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Entropy.Processor Integrated Circuit processor replacement for Stationeers. Has better performance and supports easy extensibility. WARNING: This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
